meaning: n.<美>房地产经纪人(尤指美国房地产行业工会成员)
examples: So I went to a realtor. And I liked this area, the shopping street.
And I asked the realtor, I said, "Why would anybody buy this place?"
And then she went to the realtor shop with me together, and I rented this apartment.
Potter's realtor, Anita Shishmanian, says her office has been tracking selling prices around the area.
That's when a friend, Lance Connolly, a Phoenix Realtor, told Locascio of the Neighborhood Stabilization Program.
